faqs.question: Are hornets dangerous to my family in Morrisania?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornets can be very dangerous, especially in Morrisania's densely populated residential areas. They're aggressive when defending their nests and can sting multiple times, causing severe allergic reactions. Professional removal is the safest option for protecting your household.
